name: 2marchi
description: 2M ARCHI — monorepo (front public site, admin dashboard, back API)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n back,front,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix back" "npm run dev --prefix front" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix back && npm i --prefix front && npm i --prefix admin
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix front && npm run build --prefix back && npm run build --prefix admin
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build --prefix front && npm run build --prefix admin && mkdir -p front/dist/admin && cp -r admin/dist/* front/dist/admin/
